name: Teriyaki Beef Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. TRIM FAT FROM BEEF.
2. CUT INTO STRIPS.
3. COMBINE SOY SAUCE, WATER, HONEY, GINGER, and minced garlic in a shallow pan or dish.
4. ADD MEAT AND TURN TO COAT. COVER AND REFRIGERATE FOR 30 MINUTES TO ONE HOUR.
5. ADD OIL TO A WOK OR STIR FRY PAN AT MEDIUM HIGH HEAT.
6. ADD STEAK AND VEGETABLES EXCEPT FOR TOMATO, and COOK FOR 3 TO 5 MINUTES.
7. ADD TOMATO AND COOK FOR ADDITIONAL 3 MINUTES OR UNTIL DONE.
8. SERVES FOUR. PER SERVING: 414 CALORIES, 20% FAT - 9.2 gm FAT.
